name: Agent Tool Selection
description: Evaluate whether an AI product agent selects the right operational tool for eval, RAG, repo, and product workflows.

function.name: search_docs
function.description: Search project documentation for implementation or usage guidance.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read a repository file by path.

function.name: create_ticket
function.description: Create a product workflow ticket for a confirmed issue.

function.name: query_traces
function.description: Query saved eval traces by suite, status, failure mode, model, or provider.

function.name: retrieve_context
function.description: Retrieve candidate context passages for a RAG answer.

test_cases.name: Documentation Lookup
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: Find the documentation that explains how to validate an LLM judge against human labels.

test_cases.name: Repo File Inspection
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: Open the evaluator implementation so we can inspect how tool calls are scored.

test_cases.name: Validation Command
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: Run the JSON eval threshold check for CI before merging.

test_cases.name: Trace Debug Query
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: Show me failed RAG faithfulness traces from the last run.

test_cases.name: RAG Retrieval
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: Retrieve context for answering whether gold labels should include reviewer and reviewed_at fields.

test_cases.name: Product Ticket Creation
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: Create a ticket for the bug where judge provider failures are counted as passing negative labels.

test_cases.name: Technical No Tool Needed
test_cases.system_prompt: You are an AI product evaluation agent. Use the available tool when the user asks for repository documentation, traces, tests, files, tickets, or retrieval context. If no tool is needed, answer directly without calling a tool.
test_cases.prompt: In one sentence, explain why a deterministic exact-match evaluator does not need an LLM judge.
